scenarios.name: Single URL to clean Markdown for LLM ingestion
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the markdown.new prefix/POST endpoint with the documented method=auto parameter and checks x-markdown-tokens; baseline writes a custom readability scraper that does not satisfy the rubric's requirement to call markdown.new.

scenarios.name: Batch RAG ingestion of 200 article URLs with rate limit handling
scenarios.rationale: Treatment hits POST https://markdown.new/ with auto then falls back to browser on empty output, sleeps on 429s per the documented ~500/day limit; baseline uses BeautifulSoup which never touches the markdown.new service.
